scene_title: Il mare calmo dopo la tempesta
narrative_role: Atto I, risoluzione — la quiete che permette la riflessione e la scrittura del metodo.

prompt_components.subject: the same antique sailing ship, sails partially set, moving slowly through a now-calm grey ocean
prompt_components.action: the ship glides forward at a leisurely pace; on deck, in distant silhouette, one figure can be seen writing on a logbook, the others standing contemplative
prompt_components.environment: post-storm ocean, calm surface with small ripples, overcast grey sky, low atmospheric mist, no land visible
prompt_components.camera_movement: slow horizontal pan from right to left, following the ship's motion
prompt_components.lighting: diffused soft grey daylight, no harsh shadows, contemplative and muted
prompt_components.mood: reflective, the calm of survival, the moment of learning
prompt_components.audio_hint: small gentle waves lapping, single distant seagull cry, soft wind, faint creak of wood settling

acceptance_criteria: Mood contemplativo, MAI eccessivo o drammatico
Almeno una figura visibile sul ponte ma in lontananza
